name: Baked Breast of Chicken Excelsior
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Chicken breast halves, Boneless and skinless
1 cup Sour cream, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Sprinkle chicken with garlic salt to taste.
3. Mix together melted margarine or butter, paprika, and lemon juice in a bowl.
4. Brush the chicken well with the butter mixture and place it in a shallow baking pan.
5. Bake, covered with foil, for about 30 minutes or until tender. Brush the chicken with the remaining butter mixture occasionally to prevent drying.
6. In a separate bowl, blend together sour cream, sherry or broth, mushrooms, and pepper.
7. Pour the sauce over the chicken during the last 15 minutes of baking.
